name: blank-agent
description: A minimal scaffold for building your own custom agent. Start here if you want to create something from scratch.

name: code-review-agent
description: Reviews a given code snippet or GitHub PR URL for bugs, security issues, and style improvements.

name: cold-email-agent
description: Input a target company and your product offering to automatically gather company context and generate a highly personalized cold email.

name: competitor-agent
description: Analyze market position and top competitors for any company.

name: content-agent
description: Generate social media posts, blog ideas, and marketing copy.

name: landing-page-agent
description: Input a product idea and generate landing page copy including headlines, features, and a call-to-action.

name: market-map-agent
description: Input a market domain and generate a market map listing the top 10 companies by tier.

name: newsletter-agent
description: Curates recent news on a given topic and drafts a professional newsletter formatting.

name: pitch-deck-agent
description: Analyzes a startup idea and generates an outline for a compelling 10-slide pitch deck.

name: research-agent
description: Generate company research reports including competitor analysis, market positioning, and product summaries.

name: resume-reviewer-agent
description: Analyzes a resume against a job description, provides a roast and actionable improvement tips.

name: saas-roast-agent
description: Input a website and output a product roast with weaknesses and growth ideas.

name: sales-agent
description: Generate personalized cold emails for growth teams.

name: seo-agent
description: Generate blog outlines, SEO keywords, and article drafts.

name: social-media-agent
description: Generates a week of social media posts (X, LinkedIn) from a blog post or product URL.

name: startup-idea-agent
description: Input a domain and generate 5 startup ideas with market analysis.

name: support-agent
description: Analyze incoming support tickets to extract intent, evaluate urgency, search the knowledge base, and draft a response.
